notes: v0.16.26 — RIFT foundation (Phase 1/9). First building block for the upcoming RIFT campaign: persistent ENERGY pool (cap 100) that gates rift opens. Energy regens 1 point every 6 minutes INCLUDING offline — close the game, come back tomorrow, you're topped up for the time between. New ENERGY row in the top profile bar with current value, lime diamond icon, and a '+1 in M:SS' countdown to the next tick (shows FULL when capped). Cost to open a rift will be 10 energy. Rest of rift system (node map, 3 paths, mini-modes, boss finale) lands across phases 2-9. Windows only.
